name: UAC Bypass via Fodhelper or Eventvwr
description: Detects UAC bypass techniques using fodhelper.exe or eventvwr.exe registry hijacking
query:
// Detect UAC bypass via fodhelper or eventvwr
// Trigger on registry modifications used for UAC bypass
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(fodhelper|eventvwr|computerdefaults|sdclt)\.exe"
  and parent_exe matches "(?i)(cmd|powershell|wscript)\.exe$"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
